title: "Flash of Genius" Assignment
description: Grab your popcorn and watch Flash of Genius (2008) — a movie about Robert Kearns' invention of intermittent windshield wipers in the automotive industry. Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in class so far.
descriptionText: Grab your popcorn and watch Flash of Genius (2008) — a movie about Robert Kearns' invention of intermittent windshield wipers in the automotive industry. Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in class so far.
